items.title: Sunderland v Liverpool: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Minute-by-minute updates on the 8.15pm kick-off ⚽ Slot: season ‘worst of my career’ | Email Scott 2 min: … the ball’s played back to Angulo, who tries to trick Alisson at his near post. The keeper reads the danger and claims. That’s got the home fans, already giving it plenty, going some. Meanwhile here’s Peter Oh: “Liverpool have had such bad luck with injuries, shipping comical last-gasp goals, and suspensions. How could things possibly get worse? Running into eleven Black Cats maybe? Sigh.” 1 min: It has been belting down on Wearside all day. It’s still raining. Windy as well. And Sunderland are on the front foot early doors, Mukiele in space on the right and winning a very early corner off Robertson. From which … Continue reading...

items.title: Manchester City v Fulham, Aston Villa v Brighton and more: Premier League – live
items.summary: Updates from Wednesday night’s action Latest scores | Any comments? Email Tim Alessia Russo has just scored Arsenal’s fourth goal of the night. Sarah Rendell has the details. That last news item makes this next email even more topical. “The LA Galaxy vs Los Angeles FC derby,” says Marek Wojenski in Connecticut, “is known as El Tráfico.” Continue reading...

items.title: Madrid, UEFA reach deal, end Super League suits
items.summary: UEFA, European Club Football Association (EFC), and Real Madrid have reached a deal to end all legal disputes related to the Super League, UEFA and Real Madrid said on Wednesday.

items.title: Tottenham sack Frank after 8 months in charge
items.summary: Thomas Frank has been sacked as Tottenham head coach, the club confirmed Wednesday.

items.title: Wrexham boss welcomes Mac's 'job for life' claim
items.summary: Wrexham boss Phil Parkinson has welcomed co-owner Rob McElhenney's suggestion that he has the job for life, revelling in his role in the club's "fantastic story".

items.title: Ratcliffe: 'Unpopular' Man Utd changes paying off
items.summary: Sir Jim Ratcliffe has said some of the decisions he has taken at Manchester United made him "very unpopular," but says they are now paying off.

items.title: Milner equals Premier League appearance record
items.summary: James Milner equaled Gareth Barry's all-time Premier League appearance record with his 653rd outing in Brighton's match with Aston Villa.

items.title: Historische ommezwaai in Japan: gelijkspel niet langer mogelijk
items.summary: De Japanse voetbalbond (JFA) heeft een aantal opmerkelijke spelregelwijzigingen doorgevoerd. Ter ere van het honderdjarig bestaan van de J1 League, het hoogste niveau, is het niet langer mogelijk dat een duel in een gelijkspel eindigt. Daarnaast heeft ook de puntentelling een flinke ommezwaai gekregen.

items.title: De Zerbi, Heitinga and Pochettino the leading contenders after Tottenham sack Frank
items.summary: Heitinga could be interim option to end of season De Zerbi available after leaving Marseille Tottenham are exploring their options after sacking Thomas Frank on Wednesday morning, with Roberto De Zerbi and one of their current coaches, John Heitinga, in the conversation. It is unclear whether the chief executive, Vinai Venkatesham, and the sporting director, Johan Lange, who are overseeing the process, will favour an interim choice which could be Heitinga. If they did, it would buy them time until the summer when other candidates could be available, including Mauricio Pochettino and Andoni Iraola. Continue reading...

items.title: English talent Rhodes shares early lead at PIF Saudi Ladies International
items.summary: England's Mimi Rhodes carded an opening eight-under-par round of 64 for a share of the lead at the PIF Saudi Ladies International.

items.title: VI Live: FC Utrecht pakt voorsprong na uitstekende counter
items.summary: NEC heeft woensdagavond de kans om de tweede plek in de Eredivisie te grijpen. De Nijmegenaren moeten daarvoor minstens gelijkspelen thuis tegen FC Utrecht (aftrap 21.00 uur). Eerder op de avond staan Go Ahead Eagles en SC Heerenveen tegenover elkaar en ook Liverpool komt in actie. Je volgt het in de VI Live.

items.title: From £70 a week to Premier League record 24 years later
items.summary: James Milner has equalled the Premier League appearance record, 24 years after making his debut as a 16-year-old.

items.title: Arsenal take giant stride towards WCL last eight with thumping win over Leuven
items.summary: Arsenal delivered a dominant and efficient display away to OH Leuven to take a 4-0 lead into the second leg of their Women’s Champions League playoff at the Emirates Stadium next week. Frida Maanum opened the scoring, Olivia Smith added the second, Maanum struck again and Alessia Russo finished things off against the Belgian side before midfielder Kim Little came off the bench late on to put the cherry on top of the evening, making a staggering 400th appearance for the club. Continue reading...

items.title: Milner (40) evenaart Premier League-record van meeste wedstrijden
items.summary: Met zijn optreden tegen Aston Villa verscheen James Milner woensdag in de geschiedenisboeken van de Premier League. De middenvelder van Brighton & Hove Albion evenaarde het record van meeste wedstrijden ooit van Gareth Barry. Hij viel na twintig minuten in tegen Aston Villa.

items.title: Frank's downfall: inside his struggle to get players and fans onboard
items.summary: Thomas Frank has been sacked as Tottenham manager after just eight months in charge. BBC Sport's Sami Mokbel takes a closer look at his tenure.

items.title: Nordas en Rivera bezegelen crisis Go Ahead en schieten Heerenveen richting topacht
items.summary: SC Heerenveen heeft woensdagavond vrij eenvoudig gewonnen van Go Ahead Eagles. De Friezen waren de sterkste ploeg op bezoek aan de Vetkampstraat en betaalden dat in de tweede helft uit in de score, met Lasse Nordas en Maxence Rivera als grote uitblinkers.

items.title: Norrie out of Rotterdam as Djokovic withdraws from Doha
items.summary: British No 2 Cameron Norrie bowed out in the second round of the Rotterdam Open after losing to Australian qualifier Christopher O'Connell on Wednesday.

items.title: Oosting traint met Antwerp op penalty's: 'Voor mij is het geen loterij'
items.summary: Joseph Oosting kan donderdag met Antwerp de finale van de Belgische beker bereiken. Anderlecht verslaan in het Bosuilstadion en hij is er: zijn eerste bekerfinale als hoofdtrainer. De keuzeheer laat dan ook niets aan het toeval over.

items.title: Van Veen: I didn't play at my best but still beat Littler
items.summary: "I didn't play at my best but I still beat Luke Littler" - Gian van Veen says he won't hesitate to "poke back" at the world No 1 as the Premier League Darts heads to Antwerp in week two.

items.title: Maanum double helps Arsenal put one foot in WCL quarter-finals in Leuven
items.summary: Arsenal put one foot in the quarter-finals of the Women's Champions League by thrashing OH Leuven 4-0 in Belgium in the first leg of their knockout play-off.
